# TrampHereBro
> Live union job-call board for traveling tradespeople — IBEW inside wiremen, IBEW linemen, and UA plumbers & pipefitters. 1662 open calls across 204 active locals right now, plus journeyman wage scale and hall contact info for 692 locals across the US and Canada. Updated daily from hall dispatch pages.

## Key pages
- [Live board](https://www.trampherebro.com/): all open job calls, top locals, and today's snapshot
- [Daily snapshot](https://www.trampherebro.com/snapshot): editorial rundown of where the work is nationwide
- [All locals](https://www.trampherebro.com/locals): directory of every local with call counts, wage scale, and contact info
- [Sitemap](https://www.trampherebro.com/sitemap.xml): every local page

## About
TrampHereBro aggregates publicly posted union job calls so traveling inside wiremen (and, increasingly, other trades) can find work before calling the hall. Independent information platform; not affiliated with the IBEW, UA, or any union.
